Saddened to hear of the sudden passing of Senator Lindsey Graham. Praying that God brings comfort to his family, friends, and loved ones during this difficult time.

The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act is now LAW! Proud to have 5 of my provisions included in this critical legislation to:

🏠  Help Texas families achieve the dream of homeownership
🏠  Expand housing support for Veterans
🏠  Boost the housing supply nationwide

Owning a home

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 2 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Monica De La Cruz. The social-media posture reads as security-first / counterterrorism frame because the strongest matched frame is security and counterterrorism language. Top matched terms: Iraq / Baghdad / Kirkuk.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around security and counterterrorism language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 2 security-frame hits, 0 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 0 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-05-26T19:00:00Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
